channel.title: 效率工具 on Margrop Blog
channel.description: Recent content in 效率工具 on Margrop Blog

item.title: A Very Practical Trick: Export Yuque Documents to Markdown Without a Membership
item.description: Many people use Yuque for technical notes, product documentation, or reading notes. But when it is time to move that content into a blog system such as Hugo, Hexo, or Jekyll, or sync it into a Git repository, the most annoying step is usually getting clean Markdown. If you have run into that problem, here is a small trick I have used for a long time: no paid membership, no plugin, just append a URL suffix and you get the full Markdown body directly.
